title: Down the River
overview: A father takes his estranged son on a rafting trip into the wilderness that suddenly turns into a struggle for survival. As they get to know each other better, old wounds open up. Each of them slowly becomes aware of the other’s side of the story.

trailers.title: LYSIS Trailer | PÖFF 2018
trailers.channel_name: PÖFF | Tallinn Black Nights Film Festival
